message:
style: Add blank line in rustbpe module registration

Minor code formatting improvement in the PyO3 module initialization.

## Change
Add a single blank line after `m.add_class::<Tokenizer>()?;` in the rustbpe
module registration function for better visual separation between the class
registration and the Ok(()) return statement.

```rust
fn rustbpe(m: &Bound<'_, PyModule>) -> PyResult<()> {
    pyo3_log::init();
    m.add_class::<Tokenizer>()?;
                              // <- Added blank line
    Ok(())
}
```

This aligns with Rust formatting conventions for separating logical blocks
within functions and matches the style used elsewhere in the codebase.

No functional changes - purely cosmetic whitespace adjustment.
